name: Neptune Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: Garlic clove (crushed and chopped) - 1 garlic clove
Cream cheese (4 ounces, frozen hard) - grate coarsely
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the bay shrimp.
2. Gently mix the ingredients together.
3. Place the soup in the refrigerator and chill overnight.
4. Serve the soup in chilled serving bowls and garnish with the bay shrimps floating on top.
